Background music credits
========================

The music files in this folder are available under
[Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Unported (CC BY 3.0)](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/).
If you use them, credit the original artists directly:

* "Beach" by [Aaron Krogh](http://soundcloud.com/aaron-anderson-11) - [beach](http://soundcloud.com/aaron-anderson-11/310-world-map-loop)
* "Boss", "Cave", "Desert", "Lavaland" by [Terrel O'Brien](http://soundcloud.com/gyrowolf) - [boss](http://soundcloud.com/gyrowolf/gyro-scene001-ogg), [cave](http://soundcloud.com/gyrowolf/gyro-dungeon004-ogg), [desert](http://soundcloud.com/gyrowolf/gyro-dungeon003-ogg), [lavaland](http://soundcloud.com/gyrowolf/gyro-scene002-ogg)
* "Forest" by [Dan Tilden](http://www.dantilden.com) - [forest](http://soundcloud.com/freakified/what-dangers-await-campus-map)
* "Village" by [Joel Day](http://blog.dayjo.org) - [village](http://blog.dayjo.org/?p=335)
